overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character in a green jacket walking through a fog-shrouded suburban residential street. The atmosphere is thick with fog limiting visibility, creating a tense, mysterious mood. The clip ends with a transition to a cutscene showing two figures standing in the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy suburban residential street with wooden houses

events.description: character walks alongside and passes a red pickup truck parked on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the center of the foggy street, exploring the deserted neighborhood

entered.detail: white wooden house with porch and upper balcony partially obscured by fog
tall deciduous tree with dense green foliage lining the left side of the street
vintage red pickup truck parked on the right curb with visible rust
standard black mailbox mounted on a wooden post near the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a fog-shrouded suburban street lined with oak trees and traditional wooden houses. Visibility is limited to approximately 20 meters. The character passes a red pickup truck parked on the right side while mailboxes and street signs emerge from the mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: deserted residential street with parked vehicles

events.description: character approaches and passes a blue sedan parked on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: continuing down the foggy road, passing abandoned cars and observing the silent neighborhood

entered.detail: dark blue vintage sedan with chrome details parked on the right side
two-story yellow wooden house with white trim and a front porch
wooden telephone pole with crossbars and hanging wires

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking past the red truck, revealing more of the foggy street ahead. A blue sedan comes into view on the right, followed by a yellow wooden house. The environment remains consistently foggy with trees lining both sides of the asphalt road.

scene_state.functional_zone: low angle view of foggy sky and distant figures

events.description: camera tilts upward to the overcast sky and fades to black
perspective shifts to a low angle revealing two mysterious figures standing in the dense fog

agents.ego_description: witnessing a vision or memory of two figures standing silently in the fog

notable_agents.action: tall silhouetted figure standing motionless in the fog facing the camera
smaller figure in red clothing standing beside the taller figure

entered.detail: overcast gray sky visible through the breaking fog
overhanging tree branches and leaves viewed from below

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to the foggy sky and fades to black, transitioning to a cinematic view. From a low angle, the scene reveals two mysterious figures standing in the mist - a tall silhouette and a smaller figure in red - creating an ominous and surreal atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a fog-shrouded suburban street that culminates in an ominous cinematic encounter. It begins with a character walking past traditional wooden houses and oak trees, where visibility is limited and mailboxes emerge from the thick mist. As the character progresses, the camera passes a parked red pickup truck and a blue sedan, revealing a yellow wooden house further down the asphalt road. The scene then shifts as the camera tilts upward toward the oppressive, foggy sky and fades to black. Finally, the view returns from a low angle to reveal two mysterious figures—a tall silhouette and a smaller figure in red—standing motionless within the surreal haze.
